problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: Homomorphic encryption for private computation may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
